abstract.text: Manages the local event store database used by Ensembles to track
sync metadata, revisions, and data files.
Fetches object change descriptors for integration — returns (changeId, eventId, type, globalIdentifierId, nameOfEntity).
Batch-inserts global identifiers. Returns the row IDs for all inserted rows (in order).
Manages the local event store database used by Ensembles to track
sync metadata, revisions, and data files.
to reclaim disk space after large deletions (e.g. post-rebase event cleanup).
Sync Core Data and SwiftData stores across devices using event sourcing.
Syncs data_files entries for an object change based on its property changes.
Returns the URL of the event store Core Data model on disk.
Needed for PersistentStoreEventImport/Export which read/write legacy binary format.
Returns a shared event store model instance for legacy migration support.
Batch insert multiple object changes in a single multi-row INSERT.
Returns the IDs of the inserted rows (sequential, guaranteed by AUTOINCREMENT).
